label: Morning setup
headlineSummary: Main drivers this window: AI / semis + Inflation; the clearest single-name spillover is showing up in AMZN.

overviewBoard.label: Inflation
overviewBoard.headline: Here's the inflation breakdown for March 2026 — in one chart
overviewBoard.summary: Inflation stayed on the tape across 1 headline; if it sticks, yields, duration-sensitive tech, consumers, and financials stay reactive.
overviewBoard.impactRead: Broad tape mover — first read needs confirmation; confirmation should show up in QQQ, SPY, TLT, XLF.
supportingHeadlines: Here's the inflation breakdown for March 2026 — in one chart

stockImpactBoard.headline: Why the Fed is likely to hold on rates despite soaring energy prices
stockImpactBoard.whyItMatters: Energy-supply or pricing signal that can spill into inflation expectations, energy equities, and broad risk sentiment.
stockImpactBoard.impactRead: Energy shock path needs confirmation; watch USO, XLE and any spillover into inflation expectations.

stockImpactBoard.headline: Is Amazon The Best AI Cloud Stock in Billionaire Ken Fisher’s Portfolio?
stockImpactBoard.whyItMatters: Tech/AI signal most relevant to AMZN and nearby semis/platform peers.
stockImpactBoard.impactRead: AMZN has the clearest first-order exposure and the read needs confirmation; watch peer sympathy in QQQ, SMH, XLK.

stockImpactBoard.headline: Vertiv Holdings Co (VRT) Surged Due to Robust Demand from Data Center Construction
stockImpactBoard.whyItMatters: Most relevant to Semiconductors, Technology because it may change the near-term outlook for that slice of the market.
stockImpactBoard.impactRead: Sector-level read needs confirmation; watch Semiconductors, Technology for confirmation instead of treating it as isolated.

watchNext: Watch whether the move stays concentrated in the leaders or broadens into semis, suppliers, and QQQ/SMH.
Watch bond yields, duration-sensitive tech, and whether inflation pressure spreads beyond the headline.
Watch oil follow-through and whether energy pressure feeds back into inflation expectations and index sentiment.
